examples.title: Kruskal's Algorithm
examples.code:
KRUSKAL-MST(G):
1. Sort all edges in non-decreasing order
2. Initialize DSU
3. For each edge in sorted order:
4.   If u and v are in different sets:
5.     Add edge to MST
6.     Union(u, v)
7. Return MST
examples.explanation: Sorts edges, adds safe edges using DSU to avoid cycles
